g.text: One sorted list, many logical buckets

div.p: Buckets are pointers into the sorted list. No separate containers per bucket.
Single sorted list containing all elements. Sentinels mark bucket boundaries. Elements stay in place during resize.

text.tspan: // Regular nodes: reverse bits + MSB set
// Regular nodes: reverse bits + MSB set

div.p: Contiguous Splitting: When resizing from 4 to 8 buckets, bucket 0 splits into 0 and 4.
The reverse-bit ordering ensures that the new bucket's sentinel (S4) is inserted exactly in the middle of the existing bucket's range.
